_doc: STANDARD CIRCUIT BLOCKS (电路块库) — the topology tier above standard-parts.json.
A block is a KNOWN-GOOD peripheral subcircuit (CH340 USB-serial, ESP32 auto-download,
button, USB-hub, buck) whose INTERNAL wiring is fixed and can be copied verbatim; only
the boundary nets (ports) get rebound to the host design and RefDes get reallocated.
Three-tier library model:
standard-parts.json  → 器件级 (which part / LCSC C-number)
standard-blocks.json → 电路块级 (how those parts connect + layout constraints)  ← THIS FILE
design-flow.md       → 流程级 (S0–S6 / P0–P10)
HARD RULE — a block only enters the library after ONE full-flow validation
(place → wire → sch check → DRC = 0) on a real project. Until then `validated: null`
and `internal_nets: "pending"`. NEVER hand-write a topology from memory — harvest it
from a validated oshwhub board or an official reference design (see oshwhub training loop).
Pin references use FUNCTIONAL PIN NAMES ("CH340.TXD"), never pin numbers — names are
symbol-stable, so reuse needs zero pin-renumbering. `parts` values point back into
standard-parts.json by role key so BOM/LCSC stays single-sourced.
COMMUNITY-BUILT & CREDITED — this is an open, co-built asset. Every block carries its
`author` / `contributors` (GitHub @handles, never removed) so a one-time contribution
earns permanent, traceable credit. Contribution standard, PR checklist, and the
validation gate live in references/standard-blocks-contributing.md. Blocks are versioned
(`added`/`updated`) and evolve as parts/footprints change.

block.<id>.category: usb-serial | power | mcu-support | button | protection | rf | comms
block.<id>.author: original contributor — GitHub @handle;署名不删,让贡献可追、有归属
contributors: @handle of anyone who later fixed/updated this block
block.<id>.added: version this block first entered the library, e.g. v0.6.0
block.<id>.updated: version of the last change (bump when parts/topology/rules change)
block.<id>.validated: null until proven, else 'project@commit by @handle: place→wire→check→DRC=0'

<ROLE>.value_override: optional — override the part's default value for this role
<ROLE>.note: 选型注意 / why this part / substitution caveat

<PORTNAME>.default_net: suggested net name if host has no preference

schematic_notes: 原理图链接注意 — netflag-needs-real-wire, decoupling adjacency in-sheet, net-label
conventions, pins that MUST be tied/pulled, do-not-float pins, etc.

pcb_layout.rule: short slug e.g. usb-diff-pair | decap-adjacency | keepout | trace-width
pcb_layout.value: quantified spec if any (90ohm / <=2mm / >=0.5mm width / etc)

block.<id>.bom_note: quantity/cost note across the block (e.g. all 0402, 1 extended part)

block.ch340c_usb_serial.desc: CH340C 单路 USB 转串口(内置振荡器,无需晶振)+ USB-C + ESD
block.ch340c_usb_serial.author: @zhoushoujianwork
block.ch340c_usb_serial.source: datasheet:CH340C (南京沁恒) + 立创常见参考电路
block.ch340c_usb_serial.validated: ceshi 2026-07-09 by @zhoushoujianwork: place(7件)→wire(34 netflag/netport)→sch check(0 geom-net/0 net-marker mismatch, 仅未用脚 WARN)→bridge-check(0 bridge/0 orphan)→sch drc(0 fatal/0 error)。netlist 逐网核实:5V=4 / GND=12 / V3=2 / USB_DP=4 / USB_DM=4 / CC1=CC2=2 / MCU_RX=MCU_TX=DTR=RTS=1,合并全对。

U.note: CH340C 内置晶振,比 CH340G 少一个 12MHz 晶体 + 2×22pF;直接用 C 版

C_VCC.note: VCC 去耦,紧贴 VCC 脚

C_V3.note: V3 脚对地 100nF —— VCC=5V 供电时 V3 必须接此电容;若整芯片 3V3 供电则 V3 直接并到 VCC(此电容删除)

R_CC1.note: USB-C CC1 下拉 5.1k,声明 device 取 5V

D_ESD.note: ⚠️ 选型待修(验证发现):SM712 是 RS-485 专用非对称 TVS(7V/12V 钳位),用在 USB D+/D- 上电气不对(应用对称低容 ESD,如 USBLC6-2SC6 或 0.5pF ESD 阵列;需先补进 standard-parts.json)。当前块拓扑已验证,但请优先替换此件再投产。SM712 真实脚:1/2=两路 line(符号名都显示 A1),3=K(接地)。

J_USB.note: USB-C 16P 母座;VBUS(A4B9+B4A9 两脚)作 5V 输入源。D+/D- 为 DP1/DP2 + DN1/DN2 四脚(双取向,tie DP1+DP2、DN1+DN2)。EP 四脚(8/9/10/11)= 外壳/屏蔽,接 GND。SBU1/SBU2 USB2 不用,悬空。

block.ch340c_usb_serial._internal_nets_note: 引脚用真实符号功能名(验证过)。USB-C 的 VBUS/GND/EP 各是多物理脚:tie 该名下所有脚(VBUS=A4B9+B4A9,GND=A1B12+B1A12,EP=8/9/10/11)。D_ESD 脚名符号里冲突(两 line 都叫 A1),故用脚号 1/2/3 引用。

VBUS_5V.desc: USB 取到的 5V,喂给板上电源树(降压/LDO 输入)

DTR.desc: 给自动下载电路(block.esp32_autodownload)的 DTR;不做自动下载则悬空

RTS.desc: 给自动下载电路的 RTS;不做自动下载则悬空

schematic_notes: 每个对外 port 落 netflag 必须带真实 wire(重叠坐标不算连接,DRC 看不到)——见 easyeda-wire-required 记忆。
V3 电容(C_V3)在原理图上要画在 U.V3 旁,别混进 VCC 去耦网络(验证:V3 网独立成 2 脚,未与 VCC 短)。
TXD/RXD 空闲电平由 CH340 内部上拉,无需额外 pull。
CH340C 真实脚名(验证过):D+/D-(不是 UDP/UDM)、DTR#/RTS#(带 # 号)。未用脚 NC./OUT#/CTS#/DSR#/RI#/DCD#/R232 合法悬空(sch check 出 WARN 属正常,非 fatal)。
USB-C D+/D- 双取向:必须 tie DP1+DP2、DN1+DN2(各接一根到 CH340 的 D+/D-),否则反插失效(见 official-board-benchmark 记忆)。EP 四脚接 GND 做屏蔽,SBU1/SBU2 悬空。

pcb_layout.constraint: D+/D- 差分走线,等长、尽量短、少打过孔,靠近走
pcb_layout.value: ~90ohm 差分阻抗(4 层可控);长度差 < 5mil

pcb_layout.constraint: ESD 器件放在 USB-C 端子和 CH340 之间、尽量贴近端子
VCC 去耦电容紧贴 U.VCC 引脚
USB-C 端子置于板边,CC 下拉电阻靠近端子

block.ch340c_usb_serial.bom_note: 全 0402 无源 + 1× CH340C(扩展料)+ 1× USB-C + 1× SM712 ESD;约 7 种料

block.esp32_autodownload.desc: ESP32 双三极管自动下载(DTR/RTS → EN/IO0 时序),配 CH340 使用
block.esp32_autodownload.source: official-ref:Espressif auto-program + NodeMCU 经典电路 —— 待从验证过的官方板抄取

Q1.note: NPN,EN 侧;S8050 常用,亦可 MMBT3904

block.esp32_autodownload.internal_nets: pending — 交叉耦合拓扑不凭记忆写;抄官方板验证后补(见 oshwhub 训练闭环 + copy-training 纪律)
schematic_notes: 交叉耦合真值表(DTR,RTS→EN,IO0):(1,1)→(1,1) 正常;(1,0)→(1,0) 进下载(IO0 拉低);(0,1)→(0,1) 复位。抄板时按此真值表校验拓扑对不对。
EN 常配一颗对地电容(100nF~1uF)做上电延时/去抖,视主控要求补——ESP32-S3 建议有。
此块必须和 block.ch340c_usb_serial 的 DTR/RTS 两个 port 对接。

pcb_layout.constraint: 两三极管靠近主控 EN/IO0 引脚,短走线

block.esp32_autodownload.bom_note: 2× SOT-23 NPN + 2× 10k 0402(+可选 EN 电容);约 3 种料
